## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check` and `ruff format --check` pass (backend)
- [ ] `pytest` passes (backend)
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` and `npm run build` pass (frontend, if touched)
- [ ] Docs updated (if behavior changed)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under "Unreleased"
